'''zharocho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ixazomib|ixazomib]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-r-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ixazomib|ixazomib]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zharocho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhærecheth|zhærecheth]] || [[word:zhærechej|zhærechej]] || [[word:zhærechesh|zhærechesh]] || [[word:zhæreche|zhæreche]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zharorochoth|zharorochoth]] || [[word:zharorochoj|zharorochoj]] || [[word:zharorochosh|zharorochosh]] || [[word:zharorocho|zharorocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zharochoth|zharochoth]] || [[word:zharochoj|zharochoj]] || [[word:zharochosh|zharochosh]] || [[word:zharocho|zharocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zharofchoth|zharofchoth]] || [[word:zharofchoj|zharofchoj]] || [[word:zharofchosh|zharofchosh]] || [[word:zharofchof|zharofchof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zharochotho|zharochotho]] || [[word:zharochojo|zharochojo]] || [[word:zharochosho|zharochosho]] || [[word:zharochoko|zharochoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zharochoth|zharochoth]] || [[word:zharochoj|zharochoj]] || [[word:zharochosh|zharochosh]] || [[word:zharocho|zharocho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zharochothol|zharochothol]] || [[word:zharochojol|zharochojol]] || [[word:zharochoshol|zharochoshol]] || [[word:zharochokol|zharochokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zharochothotho|zharochothotho]] || [[word:zharochojojo|zharochojojo]] || [[word:zharochoshosho|zharochoshosho]] || [[word:zharochoko|zharochoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zharochothon|zharochothon]] || [[word:zharochojon|zharochojon]] || [[word:zharochoshon|zharochoshon]] || [[word:zharochokon|zharochokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zharochothoro|zharochothoro]] || [[word:zharochojoro|zharochojoro]] || [[word:zharochoshoro|zharochoshoro]] || [[word:zharochokoro|zharochokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
